prompt: I want to refactor the command routing in this plugin. Walk me through what Prism phases I should use and in what order.
expected_output: Clear guidance on which Prism phases apply and why, referencing the workflow selection table
expectations: Response references the workflow selection table (R->P->I->V for unfamiliar, P->I->V for known, etc.)
Each recommended phase includes its output artifact path (e.g., .prism/shared/research/YYYY-MM-DD-topic.md)
Debug and Validate phases are mentioned as part of the full workflow
Context management thresholds are referenced if session is long
